name: Core Data Access Policy Contract Skeleton
description: Skeleton contract for Core data access policy boundaries.
purpose: Defines the placeholder boundary for Core data access policy semantics without evaluating access.
appliesTo: Textual Core policy contract boundary only.
nonGoals: Executable policy evaluation, policy engine behavior, rule evaluation, compliance decisions, or runtime enforcement.
Book 03 execution runtime, product UI behavior, database schema, API server behavior, or AI agent policy authority.
